---
title: "matching_LH"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`matching_LH.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/matching_LH.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `match_LH` {#match_lh}

```python
def match_LH(beta_L, y_L, dy_L, beta_H, y_H, N_bts, ansatz_beta_VS_y, p0, **kwargs)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/matching_LH.py#L62){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
